message:
fix(daemon): correct completion count + sanitize user env var

- Fix logic bug in worker.rs where completed_docs was incremented even
  when embedding failed (line 429). Documents with failed embeddings
  are now not counted as completed, fixing inaccurate progress reporting.

- Sanitize USER/USERNAME env var in socket path construction to prevent
  path traversal attacks (core.rs lines 52-60). Now filters to only
  alphanumeric, underscore, and dash characters with 64 char limit.

- Add documentation about TOCTOU window in socket permission setting
  and why the risk is minimal in practice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
